description.zh: 检索 OpenAI 官方文档，为 API、模型选择、Codex 和迁移问题提供带引用的最新答案。
description.en: Search official OpenAI documentation for current, cited guidance on APIs, models, Codex, and migrations.

review.zh: 把容易过期的模型知识交给官方来源核对，尤其适合 API 选型和升级。
review.en: Keeps model and API guidance grounded in official sources, especially useful for upgrades and selection.

bestFor.zh: API 集成、模型选型、Codex 使用咨询
bestFor.en: API integration, model selection, Codex guidance

caution.zh: 聚焦 OpenAI 产品，不适合作为通用网页搜索工具。
caution.en: Focused on OpenAI products, not general web research.

prerequisites.zh: 需要明确研究范围和可信来源边界。
prerequisites.en: Requires a defined scope and trusted-source boundaries.

outputs.zh: 带来源的结论、笔记或研究文档
outputs.en: Sourced findings, notes, or research documents

description.zh: 用可复现、证据驱动的流程定位软件故障，避免猜测式修改和反复返工。
description.en: Diagnose software failures through reproducible, evidence-driven steps instead of speculative fixes.

review.zh: 把“先复现、再定位、后验证”变成强制流程，对复杂故障和遗留系统尤其有效。
review.en: Makes reproduce, isolate, and verify a disciplined workflow, especially effective in complex or legacy systems.

bestFor.zh: 线上故障、测试失败、间歇性问题
bestFor.en: Production incidents, test failures, intermittent bugs

caution.zh: 简单问题也会走完整流程，换来的是更低误修率。
caution.en: Even simple issues follow the full process, trading speed for fewer false fixes.

prerequisites.zh: 需要现有代码仓库和可运行的开发环境。
prerequisites.en: Requires an existing repository and working development environment.

outputs.zh: 代码、测试或可审查的变更
outputs.en: Code, tests, or reviewable changes

description.zh: 创建、编辑并视觉校验 Word 文档，支持专业排版、批注和交付前渲染检查。
description.en: Create, edit, and visually verify Word documents with professional layout, comments, and render checks.

review.zh: 不仅生成内容，还要求渲染验收，适合对版式和交付质量有要求的文档。
review.en: Goes beyond text generation by requiring rendered QA, ideal when layout and delivery quality matter.

bestFor.zh: 方案书、合同初稿、报告与简历
bestFor.en: Proposals, contract drafts, reports, resumes

caution.zh: 正式法律或财务文件仍需人工复核内容。
caution.en: Legal and financial documents still require human review.

prerequisites.zh: 需要明确交付格式、目标读者和内容材料。
prerequisites.en: Requires the delivery format, target audience, and source material.

outputs.zh: 可交付文档与视觉校验结果
outputs.en: Deliverable documents with visual verification

description.zh: 创建、分析和验证 Excel 工作簿，处理公式、格式、图表与结构化数据。
description.en: Create, analyze, and verify Excel workbooks with formulas, formatting, charts, and structured data.

review.zh: 覆盖从数据清洗到成品表格的完整链路，验证步骤能明显减少公式和版式错误。
review.en: Covers the full path from cleanup to finished workbook, with validation that catches formula and layout errors.

bestFor.zh: 经营分析、财务模型、报表自动化
bestFor.en: Business analysis, financial models, report automation

caution.zh: 复杂宏、外部数据连接和企业模板需单独验证。
caution.en: Complex macros, external connections, and enterprise templates need separate validation.

prerequisites.zh: 需要可读取的数据和字段说明。
prerequisites.en: Requires readable data and field definitions.

outputs.zh: 分析结果、图表、模型或工作簿
outputs.en: Analyses, charts, models, or workbooks

description.zh: 创建和编辑演示文稿，以渲染结果检查布局、层级、可读性和视觉一致性。
description.en: Create and edit presentations, validating layout, hierarchy, readability, and consistency through rendering.

review.zh: 强调实际渲染效果，适合快速产出结构完整、能直接讲的演示材料。
review.en: Its render-first workflow is strong for quickly producing coherent, presentation-ready decks.

bestFor.zh: 路演、汇报、培训课件、销售提案
bestFor.en: Pitches, reports, training decks, sales proposals

caution.zh: 品牌级精修仍需要设计师做最后一轮视觉把关。
caution.en: Brand-level polish still benefits from a final designer review.

prerequisites.zh: 最好提供品牌规范、参考素材或目标受众。
prerequisites.en: Works best with brand rules, references, or audience context.

outputs.zh: 设计稿、视觉资产或实现建议
outputs.en: Designs, visual assets, or implementation guidance

description.zh: 用真实浏览器完成页面导航、表单填写、截图、数据提取和端到端流程调试。
description.en: Automate real-browser navigation, forms, screenshots, extraction, and end-to-end UI debugging.

review.zh: 网页验收与重复操作的首选，指令边界清晰，适合直接进入生产工作流。
review.en: A first choice for web QA and repeatable browser work, with clear boundaries and production-ready workflows.

bestFor.zh: 回归测试、后台操作、页面数据采集
bestFor.en: Regression tests, admin workflows, page extraction

caution.zh: 涉及登录态或付款操作时，应先确认执行范围。
caution.en: Confirm scope before using authenticated or payment flows.

prerequisites.zh: 需要现有代码仓库和可运行的开发环境。
prerequisites.en: Requires an existing repository and working development environment.

outputs.zh: 代码、测试或可审查的变更
outputs.en: Code, tests, or reviewable changes

description.zh: 用先写失败测试、再实现、最后重构的方式推进功能与缺陷修复。
description.en: Drive features and fixes through failing tests, implementation, and disciplined refactoring.

review.zh: 约束代理先证明问题再写实现，能降低回归并让验收标准更明确。
review.en: Forces the agent to prove the problem before implementation, reducing regressions and clarifying acceptance.

bestFor.zh: 核心逻辑、缺陷修复、可维护功能开发
bestFor.en: Core logic, bug fixes, maintainable feature work

caution.zh: 探索性原型或视觉实验不一定适合严格 TDD。
caution.en: Exploratory prototypes and visual experiments may not benefit from strict TDD.

prerequisites.zh: 需要现有代码仓库和可运行的开发环境。
prerequisites.en: Requires an existing repository and working development environment.

outputs.en: Code, tests, or reviewable changes

description.zh: 为网站和应用生成更有辨识度、可用且接近生产质量的前端界面。
description.en: Build distinctive, usable, production-oriented interfaces for websites and applications.

review.zh: 能显著改善默认生成界面的质感，兼顾视觉判断和可实现性。
review.en: Meaningfully improves generic generated UIs while balancing visual judgment with implementation reality.

bestFor.zh: 产品原型、官网、后台与交互工具
bestFor.en: Product prototypes, websites, dashboards, interactive tools

caution.zh: 必须结合现有设计系统和真实用户场景使用。
caution.en: Use it with the existing design system and real user context.

review.zh: 适合把团队 SOP 变成可重复调用的能力，是从“使用 Skills”走向“拥有工作流”的关键工具。
review.en: A key bridge from using skills to owning repeatable workflows by turning team SOPs into reusable capabilities.

description.en: Review React and Next.js code using Vercel engineering guidance for performance, data flow, and bundles.

review.zh: 规则具体、来源可信，适合在功能完成后做一轮 React 性能和架构体检。
review.en: Specific, credible rules make this ideal for a React performance and architecture pass after implementation.

bestFor.zh: Next.js 性能优化、代码审查、架构调整

caution.zh: 部分建议针对 React/Next.js，不应机械套用到其他框架。

prerequisites.zh: 需要现有代码仓库和可运行的开发环境。

description.zh: 针对常见语言与框架进行安全审查，识别风险并给出可执行的加固建议。
description.en: Review common languages and frameworks for security risks and provide actionable hardening guidance.

review.zh: 适合在提交前补一次安全视角审查，能把抽象原则落到具体代码。
review.en: A strong pre-merge security pass that turns general principles into concrete code actions.

bestFor.zh: 代码审查、上线前检查、安全整改

caution.zh: 不能替代渗透测试、依赖扫描或专业审计。
